description: Discussion on zk technology in Solana, focusing on private accounts and programs. Nico from Elusive explains how their platform allows users to create private accounts for asset management without on-chain tracking. Sven from Light Protocol discusses building private Solana programs (PSPs) that include private state transitions. The conversation emphasizes the importance of privacy in Web3, comparing it to Web2 expectations and the need for zk privacy to enable various use cases in decentralized finance.
topic_summary: Exploration of zk technology applications on Solana, highlighting private accounts and programs, and the necessity of privacy in Web3.
